title: GS1 Invoice
description: Invoice document (Factura). Legal fiscal representation of the transaction. Includes the Three-Way Match correlation triangle (related_order + related_asn), multi-currency fiscal_totals_ves block for SENIAT compliance, and optional fiscal_control for Unidigital talonario digital. / Documento de factura. Representación fiscal legal de la transacción.

doc_type.description: INVOICE: standard fiscal invoice ('Factura'). CREDIT_NOTE: reduces a prior invoice amount. DEBIT_NOTE: increases a prior invoice amount. Credit/Debit Notes require related_documents array. / INVOICE: factura fiscal estándar. CREDIT_NOTE/DEBIT_NOTE requieren el arreglo related_documents.

document_number.description: Unique invoice number. / Número único de factura.

related_order.description: References the ORDER_CONFIRMED document_number. Part of Three-Way Match triangle: Order = Receipt = Invoice. / Referencia al document_number de la ORDER_CONFIRMED. Parte del triángulo de Three-Way Match.

related_asn.description: References the DESPATCH_ADVICE document_number. Completes the Three-Way Match triangle. / Referencia al document_number del DESPATCH_ADVICE. Completa el triángulo Three-Way Match.

related_documents.description: Required for CREDIT_NOTE and DEBIT_NOTE: array of affected invoices. Enables strict historical linking required by SENIAT. / Requerido para CREDIT_NOTE y DEBIT_NOTE: arreglo de facturas afectadas.

status.description: Invoice status. ISSUED is the initial status when invoice is emitted. / Estado de la factura. ISSUED es el estado inicial al emitir.

currency_base.description: Base currency for all commercial line items. / Moneda base para todas las líneas comerciales.

issued_at.description: Invoice issue date/time. / Fecha/hora de emisión de la factura.

due_date.description: Payment due date. Calculated as issued_at + net_days. / Fecha de vencimiento del pago.

biller.description: The party issuing the invoice (typically the laboratory). RIF is mandatory on all fiscal documents. / El participante que emite la factura (típicamente el laboratorio).

payer.description: The party responsible for payment (buyer/distributor). / El participante responsable del pago (comprador/distribuidor).

ship_to.description: Final delivery destination (may differ from payer for drop-ship scenarios). / Destino final de entrega (puede diferir del pagador en escenarios de drop-ship).

payment_terms.description: Invoice payment terms. Should match the ORDER_CONFIRMED payment_terms. / Condiciones de pago de la factura.

exchange_rate_pegged.description: BCV exchange rate at time of invoicing. Used as the denominator for all VES conversions in fiscal_totals_ves. / Tasa BCV al momento de facturar. Usada como denominador para todas las conversiones VES.

lines.description: Invoice line items. Each line must reference the corresponding ORDER_CONFIRMED line. / Líneas de la factura. Cada línea debe referenciar la línea correspondiente de la ORDER_CONFIRMED.

invoiced.description: Quantity being invoiced. May differ from ordered/shipped if partial invoicing. / Cantidad facturada. Puede diferir de pedido/despachado en facturación parcial.

unit_price.description: Final agreed unit price (from ORDER_CONFIRMED). / Precio unitario final acordado (de la ORDER_CONFIRMED).

taxes.description: Tax lines for this invoice line. IVA-exempt medicines must have is_exempt=true to prevent incorrect VES tax calculations. / Líneas de impuesto para esta línea de factura.

line_total_net.description: Net line total in base currency (unit_price × invoiced_qty - discounts). / Total neto de línea en moneda base.

summary.description: Invoice totals. fiscal_totals_ves is extracted by the Government Observer Node for SENIAT Targeted Tax Manifest. / Totales de la factura. fiscal_totals_ves es extraído por el nodo observador del gobierno para el Manifiesto Fiscal Objetivo del SENIAT.

fiscal_totals_ves.description: SENIAT reporting block. ONLY this object is sent to the Government Observer Node — never the line items. / Bloque de reporte SENIAT. SOLO este objeto se envía al nodo observador del gobierno, nunca las líneas de detalle.

fiscal_control.description: Optional SENIAT talonario digital control block. Include to activate Unidigital fiscal printing workflow. Omit for international/non-fiscal B2B transactions. / Bloque opcional de control del talonario digital SENIAT. Incluir para activar flujo de impresión fiscal Unidigital.

applied_payments.description: Payments captured at time of invoicing (if not already captured in ORDER_CONFIRMED). Same structure as order applied_payments. / Pagos capturados al momento de facturar (si no se capturaron en la ORDER_CONFIRMED).
